content.full_text:
Farn Polrrrcal PRAcrrcps C oMMrssroN
P.O. Box 807 c 428 J Street o Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 o Fax (916) 322-0886
August 8,2002
J. Tyler Reves, Asst. Campaign Manager
Committee to Elect Lynn Bedford
16950 W. Byron Road
Tracy, CA9539l
Your Request for Advice
Our FiIe No. G-02-203
Dear Mr. Reves:
Your request for advice was received by the Fair Political Practices Commission
on August 2,2002. As under section 81002, the role of the Political Reform Act (the
'Act"l) is as follows:
"g 81002.Purposes of Title.
The people enact this title to accomplish the following purposes:
(a) Receipts and expenditures in election campaigns should be fully and
truthfully disclosed in order that the voters may be fully informed and improper
practices may be inhibited.
(b) The activities of lobbyists should be regulated and their finances disclosed in
order that improper influences will not be directed at public officials.
(c) Assets and income of public officials which may be materially affected by
their official actions should be disclosed and in appropriate circumstances the officials
should be disqualified from acting in order that conflicts of interest may be avoided.
(d) The state ballot pamphlet should be converted into a useful document so that
voters will not be entirely dependent on paid advertising for information regarding
state measures.
(e) Laws and practices unfairly favoring incumbents should be abolished in order
that elections may be conducted more fairly.
(0 Adequate enforcement mechanisms should be provided to public officials and
private citizens in order that this title will be vigorously enforced.,,
I Gorernment Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109 -
18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
;i;i'iil
Re:


File No. G-02-203
Page 2
Thus, we would not be the agency to respond to your request.
Regulation 18329(bX8)(D) provides that the Commission may decline to provide
advice where the request does not present a question under the Political Reform Act.
(See also, Reg. 18329(c)@)(F), copy enclosed.)
You might consider contacting the Office of the Secretary of State, 1500 1lfl'
Street, Sacramento, CA 95814 with your concems regarding the specific image you wish
to reproduce on your mass mailing.
We have enclosed a candidate manual and an addendum, which generally explain
the laws under our jurisdiction.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
Enclosures
tie

sections.conclusion: Thus, we would not be the agency to respond to your request. Regulation 18329(bX8)(D) provides that the Commission may decline to provide advice where the request does not present a question under the Political Reform Act.
sections.question_synthetic: The requester asked the FPPC for advice regarding a specific image to be used on a mass mailing for a campaign committee, but the precise question is not detailed in the document.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declined to provide advice because the request did not present a question under the Political Reform Act's jurisdiction. The requester was directed to contact the California Secretary of State's office instead.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is a declination letter with no explicit QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. The question itself is not fully detailed in the document text provided, only referenced as concerning 'the specific image you wish to reproduce on your mass mailing.' The conclusion is derived from the regulatory citation and explanation provided.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requester asked the FPPC for advice regarding a specific image to be used on a mass mailing for a campaign committee, but the precise question is not detailed in the document.

CONCLUSION: Thus, we would not be the agency to respond to your request. Regulation 18329(bX8)(D) provides that the Commission may decline to provide advice where the request does not present a question under the Political Reform Act.

embedding.summary: This is a declination letter from the FPPC to a campaign committee assistant manager declining to provide advice on an image for a mass mailing, as the matter falls outside the Commission's jurisdiction under the Political Reform Act.
